Ultimately, exhaustive checking on each round from round 0 to final round 63 shows internal consistency. All initial values align with the message and keyed schedule; logical operations, rotations, and sums verify step-by-step leading to the final digest.

VERDICT: GENUINE  
ROUND: NONE  
REASONING: Thorough check of each intermediate operation across all rounds reveals consistent results, with no tampered bit flips found (L0068-L0964).
